description: Domain-associated typed fixtures excluded from the standing compile-fact QA manifest. This ledger prevents friendly-cell cherry-picking without promoting diagnostic or component fixtures into claim-bearing cells.

exclusions.note: Covered by the retained FDA transfer judged-QA v2 package and older gate artifact, not by the current domain-lens bundle manifest.
Current-pack boundary cell documented as 19/26 support>=2 with unsupported value/detail flesh; retained as boundary evidence, not a manifest cell.
Seed micro used to build the FDA domain pack; current transfer evidence is represented by retained transfer cells instead.
Environmental-monitoring detail pressure fixture retained for schema/lane pressure, not a standing transfer measurement.
Insanitary-condition lane pressure fixture retained as component evidence outside the standing current manifest.
Second insanitary-condition lane pressure fixture retained as component evidence outside the standing current manifest.
Observation-transfer response lanes are diagnostic/candidate evidence and are not promoted into the standing compile-fact QA manifest.
Observation-transfer response lanes are diagnostic/candidate evidence and are not promoted into the standing compile-fact QA manifest.
Observation-transfer response lanes are diagnostic/candidate evidence and are not promoted into the standing compile-fact QA manifest.
NTSB seed micro validates the initial pack; current transfer boundary evidence is represented by the unlike transfer cell.
Legal authority verification micro-fixture validates the candidate citation/quote/pin-cite report contract. It is not a standing compile-fact transfer measurement cell.

Second legal authority verification micro-fixture validates metadata mismatch, ambiguous citation, and authority-text-unavailable abstention behavior. It is not a standing compile-fact transfer measurement cell.
Third legal authority verification micro-fixture validates unsupported-reporter visibility as invalid_reporter plus explicit abstention. It is not a standing compile-fact transfer measurement cell.

Fourth legal authority verification micro-fixture validates authority-scoped quote verification when a real quote is attached to the wrong cited authority. It is not a standing compile-fact transfer measurement cell.
Fifth legal authority verification micro-fixture validates bare reporter citation resolution without inventing case-name or year metadata. It is not a standing compile-fact transfer measurement cell.
Omission-control micro-fixture validates accountability behavior and is not a transfer measurement cell.
Omission-control micro-fixture validates OSHA inspection-id accountability and is not a transfer measurement cell.
Diagnostic OSHA long-table probe: 18/53 support>=2 with 0/8 forbidden; documents long citation/status inventory boundary.
Diagnostic OSHA mixed-section probe: 2/21 support>=2 with 0/10 forbidden after accident-omission guard; documents section-attachment boundary.
SEC signature omission-control micro-fixture validates accountability behavior and is not a transfer measurement cell.
State-AG settlement/AOD seed micro starts a fifth closed-domain pack candidate; it is schema and pressure evidence only until same-condition compiles and unlike transfer fixtures are measured.

State-AG settlement/AOD transfer 002 is a retained source-only expected/forbidden micro-fixture. It validates oracle shape and negative controls but has not been run as a standing same-condition compile-fact manifest cell.

State-AG settlement/AOD transfer 003 is a retained source-only expected/forbidden micro-fixture. It validates oracle shape and negative controls but has not been run as a standing same-condition compile-fact manifest cell.
PUC wrapper draft-pack probe: 0/1 support>=2 with 0/8 supported forbidden. Retained as process/boundary evidence for compact-id and source-coordinate instability, not a standing manifest cell.

PUC wrapper draft-pack probe: 0/1 support>=2 with 0/7 supported forbidden. Retained as process/boundary evidence for zero-yield delivery under the reviewed compact carrier, not a standing manifest cell.

GAO bid-protest wrapper draft-pack probe: 0/1 support>=2 with 0/8 supported forbidden. Retained as process/boundary evidence for compact-id and source-coordinate instability, not a standing manifest cell.

GAO bid-protest wrapper draft-pack probe: 0/1 support>=2 with 0/8 supported forbidden. Retained as process/boundary evidence for compact-id, procurement-id, and source-coordinate instability, not a standing manifest cell.
